query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here is the key answer:

**The most recent NIFC National year-to-date acres-burned figure available as of late June 2026 was 3,138,394 acres (across 35,884 wildfires), from the Incident Management Situation Report dated Tuesday, June 30, 2026 – 0730 MDT** (the last IMSR of June, reflecting data cumulative through June 29).

Key details:
- **Exact YTD acres:** 3,138,394
- **Date:** June 30, 2026 (0730 MDT), the final June situation report
- **Source:** NICC Incident Management Situation Report "Fires and Acres Year-to-Date (by Protection)" table, retrieved via a Wayback Machine archive (since live NIFC pages are overwritten daily and now show July data)
- **Context:** That put the season at 159% of the 2016–2025 ten-year average for acres and 133% for number of fires, at National Preparedness Level 4.

For validation of the trajectory, the subsequent July 8, 2026 IMSR showed 3,420,025 acres and the live NIFC pages (July 8 data, updated July 9) showed 3,429,254 acres — confirming 3,138,394 as the correct late-June endpoint.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report — Tuesday June 30, 2026 – 0730 MDT
sources.snippet: Fires and Acres Year-to-Date (by Protection): TOTAL FIRES 35,884; TOTAL ACRES 3,138,394. Acres at 159% of ten-year average (1,977,688).

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Live page (July 9, 2026): 3,429,254 acres year-to-date; 37,949 year-to-date wildfires. Preparedness-level reference 'as of June 29, 2026'.

sources.title: Statistics | National Interagency Fire Center
sources.snippet: Year-to-date Wildfires 37,949; Year-to-date Acres Burned 3,429,254 (current/live, July 8-9 2026). Source: Incident Management Situation Report.

sources.title: Incident Management Situation Report — Wednesday July 8, 2026 – 0730 MDT
sources.snippet: YTD (by Protection): TOTAL FIRES 37,783; TOTAL ACRES 3,420,025 (146% of ten-year average).

sources.title: National Year-to-Date Report on Fires and Acres Burned by State and Agency (for 07/08/2026)
sources.snippet: Totals: 37,949 wildland fires; 3,429,254.2 acres (report for 07/08/2026, executed 09-Jul-2026).
